summary: Matched part of sysdolphin/baselib/class.c by moving hsdInitClassInfo and the small print helper previously known as func_80381D08 out of assembly into C, renaming the helper to OSReport_PrintSpaces, and updating headers/prototypes. The matched C initializes HSD_ClassInfo metadata, validates parent object/info sizes with asserts, copies inherited allocation data from the parent class, links the class into the parent's child list, and implements space printing through variadic OSReport calls.
what_changed: Removed the assembly bodies for hsdInitClassInfo and func_80381D08 from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/class.s, leaving later assembly references retargeted to the new C symbol name.
Added a C implementation of hsdInitClassInfo in src/sysdolphin/baselib/class.c.
Added OSReport_PrintSpaces as the C implementation of the former func_80381D08 helper.
Renamed callsites in remaining assembly from func_80381D08 to OSReport_PrintSpaces.
Changed OSReport's declaration in include/functions.h from an untyped K&R-style declaration to void OSReport(char*, ...).
Updated class.h to include dolphin/types.h and expose prototypes for hsdInitClassInfo and OSReport_PrintSpaces.
Declared external string/data labels used by the matched C implementation: lbl_804075CC, lbl_80407604, lbl_804D5FA8, and lbl_804D5FB0.
smart_moves: The former anonymous helper func_80381D08 was identified by behavior and renamed to OSReport_PrintSpaces, making remaining assembly callsites more searchable and semantically meaningful.
The hsdInitClassInfo translation preserves the exact parent initialization behavior by calling parent_info->head.info_init when the parent class flags do not indicate initialization.

The code models inherited class metadata with memcpy from parent_info->alloc to class_info->alloc using parent_info->head.info_size - 0x28, matching the assembly's offset-based copy rather than over-abstracting the structure.
Assert calls retain the original source label and line numbers, using lbl_804D5FA8 with lines 94 and 95 and the original assertion message labels.
Adding a variadic OSReport prototype supports the new C helper and better reflects observed call patterns in the disassembly.
decomp_lessons: Small utility functions embedded near larger systems can often be matched and named before the whole file is decompiled; here the print-spaces loop was separated from the remaining assembly and all branch labels/calls were updated.
When decompiling HSD class initialization, preserve the precise field order: flags, library_name, class_name, obj_size, info_size, parent, child, next, nb_exist, and nb_peak.

Parent class linkage in hsdInitClassInfo is implemented by copying inherited allocation/method data from the parent, then inserting the new class at the head of parent_info->head.child via class_info->head.next.
Signed 16-bit casts for obj_size and info_size are significant: the implementation stores class_size and info_size through s16 fields and then compares against the parent's signed halfword fields.
Matching assert-heavy code may require carrying raw string labels forward until better rodata names are known.
Header cleanup can be part of matching work: adding concrete function prototypes and needed type includes reduces ambiguous declarations that can hide calling convention or variadic-call issues.
naming_conventions: Anonymous func_80381D08 was renamed to OSReport_PrintSpaces based on its behavior of calling OSReport repeatedly with a space/string label.
HSD class symbols use hsd/HSD casing already present in the project: hsdInitClassInfo, HSD_ClassInfo, HSD_Class, HSD_MemoryEntry.
Function parameters in the new prototype use descriptive class-system names: class_info, parent_info, base_class_library, type, info_size, and class_size.
Unidentified rodata/sdata labels remain in lbl_80xxxxxx form when no stable semantic name is established.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted matched PowerPC assembly for hsdInitClassInfo and the print-spaces helper after introducing equivalent C in class.c.
Preserved remaining assembly call offsets while changing the symbol name on branch-and-link instructions to OSReport_PrintSpaces.
Used direct struct field assignments to reproduce stores at fixed offsets in HSD_ClassInfoHead.
Used memcpy with &class_info->alloc and &parent_info->alloc to correspond to the assembly copy from offset 0x28 for parent_info->head.info_size - 40 bytes.
Used explicit casts to s16 for class_size and info_size to match halfword stores.
Kept exact __assert arguments, including file label and line numbers, to match generated code.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that rename lbl_804075CC, lbl_80407604, lbl_804D5FA8, or lbl_804D5FB0 to semantic rodata names.
Find subsequent work on src/sysdolphin/baselib/class.c to see whether remaining functions after func_80381D58 were matched.
Check whether OSReport_PrintSpaces remains the accepted name or is later moved to a more general Dolphin/OS utility header.
Inspect later HSD_ClassInfo struct refinements to confirm the alloc offset and inherited method/callback layout.
